summary: Verified the served landing page HTML, inline i18n dictionary, standing-order SVGs, brand PNG assets, footer metadata, and local LICENSE; all acceptance checks held.
steps: GET / with Node HTTP and decode the served HTML
Parse the inline STRINGS JavaScript object and compare en/pt key sets
Count <article class="order"> blocks and verify each includes an inline <svg>
Scan the served HTML for any U+2014 em dash characters
GET the 8 /brand/*.png assets and validate status, content-type, and size
Verify footer MIT/GitHub text in served HTML and confirm LICENSE is MIT
